allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\sudhe\\projects\\rag-assistant; Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location C:\\Users\\sudhe\\projects\\rag-assistant; python -m uvicorn api:app --port 8000 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "uvicorn.log" -Encoding utf8 } | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; Get-Content uvicorn.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri "http://localhost:8000/auth/login" -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $token = $r.token; Write-Host "Token: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)..."; Write-Host "Role: $\($r.role\)"; Write-Host "Username: $\($r.username\)"; Write-Host "user_id: $\($r.user_id\)"; $global:token = $token)

PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.Name -match "python"} | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) ? "Port 8000 still in use" : "Port 8000 free")
Bash(python -c "from rag_assistant.connectors.registry import CONNECTOR_REGISTRY, CONNECTOR_METADATA; print\('Registry OK:', list\(CONNECTOR_REGISTRY.keys\(\)\)\)")

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\sudhe\\projects\\rag-assistant && Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\rag_api_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\rag_api_err.txt" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep 4; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rag_api_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host "Stopped")

PowerShell(cd c:\\Users\\sudhe\\projects\\rag-assistant; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\rag2_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\rag2_err.txt" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep 6; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\rag2_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/mcp" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "MCP status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "MCP response: $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\(':'\)[0]\)" })
